mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product (name, description, price, stock, category_id, image_url, status) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{categoryId}, #{imageUrl}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, description, price, stock, category_id, image_url, status, create_time FROM product WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND status = 'ON' ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} AND status = 'ON'
